biological_replicate: wheat progenitors, including T. urartu (PI428185) with an AA genome, A. speltoides (PI542245) with an SS genome, A. tauschii var. strangulate (AS2393) with a DD genome, tetraploid T. durum Langdon (AABB), and hexaploid wheat Ak58
experimental_design: Khib-modified proteins were enriched in multiple primary metabolic pathways
factor_value: Khib is an evolutionarily-conserved PTM in wheat and its progenitors.
number_of_fractions: using affinity purification and mass spectroscopy of 2-hydroxyisobutyrylome.
